messages.content: I mean, what is the meaning of life?

I don't know, I'm sure there are many people who spend their life trying to figure this out. I personally don't need to figure this out, I am living my life just fine without knowing the meaning of life. I mean, I can dream though, the meaning of life could be something like: love, happiness, generosity, justice, etc.
